---
title: "Publications"
subtitle: "Research papers and preprints"
toc: true
toc-title: "On this page"
---

## Peer-reviewed Publications

::: {.publication-list}
1. Chao Xia, Jiabin Yin, **Xingjian Zhou**. "New monotonicity for *p*-capacitary functions in 3-manifolds with nonnegative scalar curvature." *Advances in Mathematics* **440** (2024), 109526.<br>
   [Journal](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.aim.2023.109526){.btn .btn-sm .btn-outline-primary}

2. Jiabin Yin, **Xingjian Zhou**. "Sharp upper bounds of *p*-capacity in convex cone and asymptotically flat half-space." *Letters in Mathematical Physics* **116** (2026), Article 34.
:::

## Preprints

::: {.publication-list}
1. Chao Xia, Jiabin Yin, **Xingjian Zhou**. "Mass-*p*-Capacity Inequalities in Asymptotically Flat Half-Spaces." *arXiv:2605.31202* (2026).<br>
   [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.31202){.btn .btn-sm .btn-outline-primary}

2. Jiabin Yin, **Xingjian Zhou**. "General monotone formula for homogeneous *k*-Hessian equation in the exterior domain and its applications." *arXiv:2506.01434* (2025).<br>
   [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2506.01434){.btn .btn-sm .btn-outline-primary}
:::

For a compact overview of my academic background, see my [Curriculum Vitae](cv.qmd).
